title: Charlotte Area to Experience Near-Record High Temperatures
summary: High temperatures approaching record highs are expected in the Charlotte area this weekend.
charlotte_impact: Unseasonably warm weather can impact outdoor activities and potentially strain energy resources.

title: Shooting Near University City Walmart, Suspect Arrested
summary: One person was injured in a shooting outside a Walmart in University City. A suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing concerns about public safety and gun violence in the University City area.

title: Salisbury Shooting Leaves One Dead, Suspect in Custody
summary: A man was killed in a shooting in Salisbury. A suspect, Namyous Dejhmariek’Kali Jackson, has been arrested and charged with murder.
charlotte_impact: The incident underscores the prevalence of violent crime in the region.

title: Queens Royals Make History with First NCAA Tournament Appearance
summary: Queens University of Charlotte's men's basketball team is set to compete in its first NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament.
charlotte_impact: This historic achievement brings pride and excitement to the university and the Charlotte community.

title: Monroe Native Honored as NASA Hidden Figure
summary: Dr. Christine Darden, from Monroe, NC, is recognized for her contributions as one of NASA's human computers during Women's History Month.
charlotte_impact: Darden's story inspires future generations of women in STEM fields.

title: Gaston County Farmers Markets to Accept SNAP Benefits
summary: Farmers markets in Gastonia, Mount Holly, and Belmont will begin accepting SNAP benefits in April.
charlotte_impact: Increases access to fresh, healthy food for low-income residents in Gaston County.

title: VERIFY: I-77 Toll Lanes and Major Crashes
summary: Confusion surrounds I-77 toll lanes during crashes. Tolls may be lifted near crash sites, but not always.
charlotte_impact: Clarifies toll policies during traffic incidents.

title: Charlotte City Council Seeks Federal Funding for Law Enforcement
summary: Charlotte City Council is requesting over $10 million in federal funding for law enforcement equipment and resources.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the city's efforts to enhance public safety through federal partnerships.

title: Historic Salisbury Building Transformed into Affordable Senior Housing
summary: A historic building in downtown Salisbury has been renovated into an affordable senior housing community.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the growing need for affordable housing options for seniors in the area.

title: Authorities Seek to Identify Skeletal Remains Found in Lancaster County
summary: Lancaster authorities released a composite image to identify skeletal remains found in 2024, seeking public assistance.
charlotte_impact: Aids in solving a cold case and providing closure to potential family members.

title: Juvenile Arrested in Monroe Bedroom Break-in
summary: Monroe Police arrested a juvenile suspect in connection with a break-in where a woman awoke to find someone trying to remove her clothing.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about home security and juvenile crime in Monroe.

title: I-485 Crash Shuts Down Lanes in Southeast Charlotte
summary: A crash on the I-485 outer loop near Park Road has caused lane closures in southeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Traffic incidents can cause significant delays and disruptions for commuters.

title: Buc-ee's Confirms North Carolina Location Opening in Late 2027
summary: Buc-ee's has confirmed that its North Carolina location is expected to open in late 2027.
charlotte_impact: The new facility is expected to be bigger than a pro football field!

title: Former USPS Employee Sentenced in Mail Theft, Bank Fraud Scheme
summary: Andre Whitehurst was sentenced to 15 months for his role in a bank fraud scheme involving stolen mail, resulting in attempted losses of $364,000.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of mail theft and fraud.

title: Catawba County Considers Merging Local Schools
summary: Catawba County is considering merging local schools into one school district, to be called the Catawba Valley School District.
charlotte_impact: Could lead to changes in school administration and resource allocation.
